description_long: This object is a tall, slender, and featureless silhouette with a slightly tapered form from top to bottom. The outline is symmetrical and straight, lacking any visible limbs, facial features, or clothing details. The surface appears uniformly dark and opaque, with no discernible texture, pattern, or color variation. There are no visible joints, seams, or articulated parts, suggesting a monolithic construction. The object’s proportions are elongated, resembling a simplified or abstracted human figure, but without any anatomical detail. Its minimalist design gives it a stark, almost totemic presence.
description: A tall, slender, featureless black silhouette with a straight, tapered form and no visible details or textures.
description_view_0: A straight-on view of the tall, tapered black silhouette, showing a symmetrical and featureless outline.
description_view_1: A side view of the same silhouette, maintaining the same straight, featureless profile with no visible limbs or details.
description_view_2: Another straight-on view, nearly identical to view 0, with the same symmetrical, tapered outline.
description_view_3: A side view similar to view 1, showing the same uniform, featureless black form.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing or garment details; the object is a featureless silhouette with no discernible attire.
attribute_pose: The object stands upright in a static, vertical position with no visible limbs, head, or articulated body parts.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present; the surface is completely featureless.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair or hairstyle; the head region is indistinguishable from the rest of the form.
